_doc: IL-6/CRS validation. Clinical anchors restricted to the THREE manifest-VERIFIED digitized-curve values (mosun mean 127.4, glofit median 30.2, talq median 19.8). teclistamab EXCLUDED: its 21 pg/mL is a loose MajesTEC-1 mean, not a digitized curve, and SUBMISSION_MANIFEST v3 says do not cite it as a sourced anchor.
teclistamab_EXCLUDED: model peak 429.0 computed but NO verified clinical anchor; 21 mean is unverified MajesTEC-1, dropped per manifest v3. Any tecli-based ratio is PROVISIONAL, not validated.

glofit/tecli.note: looked like a match (1.52x vs 1.44x) but leans on the UNVERIFIED tecli 21 anchor — NOT a validated pass

mosun/tecli_prior_headline.note: prior 'headline' test; tecli anchor unverified so this is PROVISIONAL not the validation

VERDICT: FAIL on verified anchors. Among the 3 manifest-verified digitized anchors (mosun/glofit/talq), the cleanest same-statistic pair (glofit/talq, both medians) is WRONG DIRECTION, driven by talquetamab inversion. mosun/glofit direction is correct but magnitude compressed (1.11x vs 4.22x). The earlier 'good match' (glofit/tecli) leaned on an anchor the manifest says not to cite; removing it removes the apparent pass.
DIAGNOSIS_talq: talq highest il6_prod (1.80M pg/hr) + highest peak despite LOWEST Cmax (7.4), driven by depletion-weighted engagement. Clinically LOWEST IL-6 because GPRC5D is on plasma cells/keratinized tissue, NOT myeloid-contacting compartments. Myeloid IL-6 term doesn't condition on WHICH target compartment killing occurs in. Real mechanism gap.
NO_RESCUE: Not denominator-shopped, not talq-dropped. teclistamab excluded because its anchor is unverified per manifest, NOT to improve the result (excluding it makes the result WORSE — removes the only apparent match).
